hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qiE '\.(env|pem|key)$|credentials|secrets' && echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot write to sensitive files (.env, credentials, secrets, keys)' && exit 2 || exit 0

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'rm\s+-rf\s+(\/|\.|src|app|\~)|--force\s+push|drop\s+table|truncate\s+table' && echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected (rm -rf on protected paths, force push, DROP/TRUNCATE TABLE). rm -rf node_modules and rm -rf dist are allowed.' && exit 2 || exit 0
